title: Random block drops
description: A datapack that makes every block drop a random item
body:
# Random Block Drops

This datapack changes Minecraft so that every block drops a random item when mined. There are no instructions needed. Install it, reload the world, and chaos begins. Oak logs can drop bedrock, dirt can drop diamonds, gravel can drop food, and anything else can happen.

## Features
- Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11 and newer
- Works in singleplayer and on servers
- Fully automated. No commands needed
- Perfect for challenge runs, YouTube content, or cursed SMP events

## Installation
1. Download the .zip file
2. Place it in your world folder under: `world/datapacks/`
3. Open the world and run `/reload`
4. Break a block and see what happens

## Notes
- All blocks use a random predetermined mapping generated by the pack
- Loot table overrides are used, so modded blocks are not affected unless you create add-ons
- You can delete this datapack safely without corrupting the world
